commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-agent generated mcporter config handling for QMD memory search, preserves configured mcporter servers, tolerates log-prefixed mcporter JSON, expands QMD tests, and changes QQBot token fetches to use the SSRF guard.

PR surface: Source +225, Tests +443, Other -1. Total +667 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The current-main source still passes QMD-scoped XDG env to mcporter, and the linked report plus maintainer discussion give a concrete mcporter 0.10.x reproduction path, although I did not run a live gateway/mcporter repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair lane can make the generated config write idempotent, preserve QQBot token capture opt-out during rebase, and refresh focused tests without changing product direction.
